block_02: Meet technical indicators, a simple but important step to successful trading. Think of them as a compass for traders, providing a sense of direction and helping navigate through uncertain market conditions. At Quadcode Markets, we give you over 100 indicators — let’s learn how they work on the example of one simple strategy.
block_04: How to apply technical analysis on the platform?
block_05: The Indicators tab can be found in the bottom left panel of the Traderoom.
block_06: A trader can work with indicators in several ways:
block_07: Use indicators from the list with default settings or change the settings according to your strategy.
block_08: Create and save your own indicators in the "Script" section.
block_09: Create combinations of indicators and save them as templates. After that, they can be applied to any chart in 1 click.
block_12: In this strategy, we use a single indicator — Moving Average (MA), which is a popular trend indicator. It reflects the average price of an asset over a certain period of time and gives strong Buy/Sell signals. If you trade on short timeframes, change the period settings to 6 and 14.
block_29: BUY when the price and the green short-term EMA goes up and cross above the red long-term EMA.
block_30: SELL when the price and the green line go down and cross below the red EMA.
block_34: In the next email we’ll talk about news trading and share a video tutorial on how to use the economic calendar — don’t miss out.
